content: The subsection allows you to browse through the list of the latest changes (creation, modification, deletion etc.) made by users to the entities (rooms, opportunities, files etc.) within your {{productName}}.

comment.text: This translation key is used as a subheader on an empty screen that displays when there are no audit trail users. It informs the user about the purpose of the section and how it relates to their {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The provided translation is in Romanian, not German.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Der Unterabschnitt ermöglicht es Ihnen, die Liste der neuesten Änderungen (Erstellung, Änderung, Löschung usw.) zu durchsuchen, die von Benutzern an den Entitäten (Räume, Gelegenheiten, Dateien usw.) innerhalb Ihres {{productName}} vorgenommen wurden.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The sentence structure in Finnish is grammatically broken and logically scrambled. The phrase 'katsella... kautta {{productName}}' (to browse... through {{productName}}) incorrectly implies browsing through the product itself rather than browsing the list within the product. The placement of '{{productName}}' at the end makes the sentence nonsensical.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Alaosio mahdollistaa käyttäjien {{productName}}-kokonaisuuksiin (huoneet, mahdollisuudet, tiedostot jne.) tekemien viimeisimpien muutosten (luonti, muokkaus, poisto jne.) selaamisen listan kautta.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'modificēšana' is a loanword/calque from English and is not standard Latvian for 'modification' in this context. The correct term is 'mainīšana'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Apakšsadaļa ļauj pārlūkot jaunāko izmaiņu sarakstu (izveide, mainīšana, dzēšana utt.), ko lietotāji veikuši jūsu {{productName}} esošajās entītijās (telpas, iespējas, faili utt.).

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'opportunities' in the context of CRM/entities is translated as 'возможности' (capabilities/possibilities), which is a literal translation error. In a business/CRM context, 'opportunities' refers to 'сделки' or 'возможности продаж'. More importantly, the translation 'сущности(возможности...' lacks a space after the opening parenthesis, and the translation of 'opportunities' as 'возможности' in this specific list is semantically weak for a software entity.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Раздел позволяет просматривать список последних изменений (создание, модификация, удаление и т. д.), внесенных пользователями в сущности (сделки, файлы и т. д.) в вашем {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'පරිශ්‍රීලකයින්' (parishrilakayin) is a misspelling/incorrect word for 'users' (පරිශීලකයින් - parishilakayin).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබගේ {{productName}} තුළ අඩංගු ඒකකවල (කාමර, අවකාශ, ගොනු ආදිය) පරිශීලකයින් සිදු කරන ලද නවතම වෙනස්කම් (සෑදීම්, සංශෝධන, මකාදැමීම් ආදිය) ලැයිස්තුව හරහා පිරික්සීමට අනුකොටස ඔබට ඉඩ සලසයි.
